source.scope: Official-source-backed Belgium income-year 2026 ordinary resident personal income tax with caller-confirmed municipal addition.

BE.notes: Income-year 2026 ordinary resident personal income tax on caller-confirmed jointly taxable income, including the standard basic tax-free amount and a caller-confirmed municipal addition. Regional reliefs and enhanced allowances remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 ordinary resident personal income tax and caller-confirmed municipal addition.
